violations.text: The floor in the deli area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated he has contacted a contractor for estimate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Menu boards/point of service is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Inspector provided application. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RODOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and pizza station were lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to call for service. All dishes, utensils, and equipment to be sanitized in the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Various foods in the display case, which were prepared in advance, were not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Inspector observed temperatures ranging 45-55 degrees. Foods disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals (chlorine) taken from bulk supplies were placed in a re-used bottle (glass cleaner). New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, foods prepared in advance were insufficiently cooled before placing in display case. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the food preparation refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Sauces packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Utensils in storage crocks (kitchen and sandwich prep areas) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean. Inspector observed assembled pizza boxes stored on the floor in the office. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -deli case slider doors (observed cracked, missing pieces) -deli prep unit (ambient temp 49 degrees) -deli prep unit lid (held with tape) -wooden pizza peel (cracks) -ice machine lid (held with straps). New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The dish machine failed to dispense chlorine sanitizer as evidenced by test strips reading 0 parts per million. PIC to called for service; technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:-door tracks of deli display cases-doors to deli display cases-display case vent covers-prep unit gaskets-ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
A leak was observed at the faucet of the kitchen hand washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The floor tiles in the deli area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
